cards.body: Some people on GLP-1 medications notice increased tooth sensitivity. When appetite drops, important nutrients like vitamin D3, K2, and zinc can fall short. Grüns Superfood Gummies help support daily nutrition with 20+ vitamins and minerals to help fill those gaps.
cards.title: Support Oral Wellness on GLP-1
